```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement text preprocessing for NLP tasks"
---
# NLP Preprocessing
## Task
Build text preprocessing pipeline for NLP tasks.
## Requirements
1. Tokenization with appropriate tokenizer. 2. Handle special characters, URLs, mentions.
3. Implement text normalization (lowercase, lemmatize). 4. Handle multilingual text.
5. Create efficient data loaders with batching.
## Constraints
- Use tokenizer matching the model. Handle edge cases (empty, very long). Batch efficiently.
## Success Criteria
- Text preprocessed consistently. Edge cases handled. Batching efficient.
```
